scenarios.description: traverse(elements) throws IllegalArgumentException when elements contains a null entry
scenarios.precondition: Elements list with one null element
scenarios.expectedResult: IllegalArgumentException is thrown due to null root in nested traverse
pseudocode: TEST TC12 traverse elements with null child

scenarios.description: traverse(elements) with single-element list invokes visitor exactly once
scenarios.precondition: Elements list with one simple Element child
scenarios.expectedResult: visitor.head and tail called exactly for the one element at depth=0
